englishDefinitions: (transitive) To draw up (a document etc.), to designate (a cheque). [with to ‘a given recipient, payee’]
(transitive) To discern; to manage to see, hear etc.
(now chiefly US, regional, intransitive) To manage, get along; to do (well, badly etc.).
(transitive, intransitive) To represent; to make (something) appear to be true.
(slang, chiefly US, intransitive) To get along with (someone).
(slang, chiefly US, intransitive) To make an (often temporary) home.
(slang, chiefly US, intransitive) To embrace and kiss passionately.
(slang, chiefly US, intransitive) To engage in heavy petting or sexual intercourse.
persianTranslation: (متعدی) تنظیم (سند و غیره)، تعیین (چک). [با «گیرنده معین، گیرنده پرداخت»]
(متعدی) تشخیص دادن; برای مدیریت دیدن، شنیدن و غیره
(اکنون عمدتاً ایالات متحده، منطقه ای، غیرقابل انتقال) برای مدیریت، کنار بیایید. انجام دادن (خوب، بد و غیره).
(گذرا، غیر گذرا) به نمایندگی; درست جلوه دادن (چیزی)
(عامیانه، عمدتاً آمریکایی، غیر گذرا) کنار آمدن با (کسی).
(عامیانه، عمدتاً آمریکایی، غیرقابل انتقال) برای ساختن خانه (اغلب موقت).
(عامیانه، عمدتاً آمریکایی، غیرقابل انتقال) برای در آغوش گرفتن و بوسیدن پرشور.
(عامیانه، عمدتاً آمریکایی، غیرقابل انتقال) برای شرکت در نوازش سنگین یا آمیزش جنسی.
examples: Cheques may be made out to the Foo Bar Company.
In the distance, I could just make out a shadowy figure.

There was a startling lack of creativity and if Van Gaal had listened closely he would have made out the mocking chants from the away end, as the visiting fans embarked on the repertoire of songs that formed the soundtrack to David Moyes’s time in the job.
Oh, you were on a TV game show? How did you make out?
Regarding money—I shall economize and make out probably very well from now on—without any outside help.
His version of the story makes me out (to be) the bad guy.
She hadn't invited me to a party at her house since the third grade, and here she was, making out like we'd never stopped being friends.
Him and I always make out well.
I'll make out in this room for the night.
We found a secluded spot where we could make out in private.
